TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Michael_D_Higgins, title = Michael_D_Higgins, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michael_D_Higgins} }

S.FORM: I 1941 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 18 a romi'ad ko kasofocan ni Michael D. Higgins , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Iceland , Ireland anini i ci Michael D. Higgins, patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 11 a romi'ad. I 'ayaway a 'orip śó©śúüÁĒüśīĽ Lalomaan a 'orip Śģ∂Śļ≠ÁĒüśīĽ
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ko~u kaso~ufo~u ¶an ni mi ¶ńßa…ô…ĺ …¨~…ģ. ńßi**ins , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u i ¶…ô…ĺan…¨~…ģ , ir…ô…ĺan…¨~…ģ anini i ¶i mi ¶ńßa…ô…ĺ …¨~…ģ. ńßi**ins, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. i °ajawaj a °o~urip **** …ĺa…ĺo~umaan a °o~urip ****
S.FORM: I 1941 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 18 a romi'ad ko kasofocan ni Michael D. Higgins , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Iceland , Ireland anini i ci Michael D. Higgins, patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 11 a romi'ad. I 'ayaway a 'orip śó©śúüÁĒüśīĽ Lalomaan a 'orip Śģ∂Śļ≠ÁĒüśīĽ
